title: Looking to hire expert for Solopreneuer company/CRM
excerpt: Small company looking for a CRM to be built that has automations and workflows that are easy to comprehend and adjust too. Not a large company, spending limit reflects smaller size of company. Please message me with your…

posts.author: Dawgboss123 (Brittney Howard)
posts.cookedHtml: Small company looking for a CRM to be built that has automations and workflows that are easy to comprehend and adjust too. Not a large company, spending limit reflects smaller size of company. Please message me with your inquires if this is a project that you would do well with. I have a CRM built by another creator and it is not at all something that works for us.

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @Dawgboss123 and welcome to the monday.com community forums!

I believe I have the perfect solution for you. The team at CarbonWeb has produced an end-to-end solution on the monday marketplace called the CarbonCRM Suite. I provide a comprehensive demo on the solution and would be happy to discuss how your team can utilize it.

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Dawgboss123 ,

I am certain our team at thespelas.com can help you out!

We have extensive experience building custom CRMs for companies of all sizes, tailored to our clients’ needs, and we are also experts at creating time saving automations and workflows .

In every project we undertake it is imperative to us for our clients to fully comprehend their solution, and we provide training to that end.

We would be very happy if you scheduled a free consulting session with us here so you can better explain to us your needs and vision.

Otherwise, you could also contact us at info@thespelas.com.

I really hope our services can be of use to you!

Best Regards,
Giannis Koukounas, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Dawgboss123 !

Thanks for reaching out to the monday .com community forum!

Choosing monday .com as your workplace’s CRM is a commendable decision. monday .com CRM offers a streamlined approach to organizing various complex workflows or projects while delivering a transparent work culture. With monday .com CRM implementation, you can manage everything starting from routine business activities to sales management in a structured way. By using monday .com, you can create sophisticated virtual workflows, so that you can monitor task progress and goals, and align processes across departments (marketing, IT, sales, HR, etc.) with higher flexibility and transparency. Experts from the right partner company can set up monday CRM integrations and automation.

Regards
Neelam B
Damco Solutions
Phone: +1 609 632 0350 | Email : info@damcogroup.com
